schemaVersion__doc: Increment when you make breaking structural changes to this file (not required for value tweaks).
description__doc: Short summary of what this file controls. Game code reads values via loadFloorDifficulty.js → CONFIG.
description: Main-game floor difficulty: enemy tile density, HP/damage scaling, leader cadence, Void trial anchor floor.
enemyDensity__doc: How many dungeon tiles are enemies vs empty/loot. Drives TileDensity.js weight pool (not individual enemy stats).

enemyDensity.shareAtFloor1__doc: Target share of the random tile pool for enemy tiles at floor 1 (e.g. 0.2 = 20%). Lower = fewer fights, more pathing room.
enemyDensity.shareAtFloor50__doc: Same as shareAtFloor1, anchor at floor 50. Values between floors 1–50 are linearly interpolated.
enemyDensity.shareAtFloor100__doc: Same anchors, at floor 100. Floors 50–100 interpolate between shareAtFloor50 and this value.
enemyDensity.fastShareRatio__doc: Of all enemy tiles spawned, what fraction roll a fast-tagged enemy (attributes: fast). Computed as numerator/denominator → fastShareOfEnemies in CONFIG.
enemyDensity.minEmptyWeight__doc: Minimum weight for empty tiles in the pool so the generator always leaves non-enemy outcomes (prevents 100% enemy grids).

enemyScaling__doc: Per-floor HP and damage multipliers applied in EnemyScaling.scaleEnemyDef() to every enemy type (base stats still live in enemies.js).

enemyScaling.hpInflectionFloor__doc: Floor where HP growth switches from floorScaleHP to floorScaleHP_late. Damage uses the dmg rates below with the same inflection.
enemyScaling.floorScaleHP__doc: Linear HP growth per floor for floors 2 through hpInflectionFloor. Example 0.24 → +24% of base HP per floor step (before statMult).
enemyScaling.floorScaleHP_late__doc: Extra linear HP per floor above hpInflectionFloor (steeper deep-run scaling). Added on top of HP already gained through the inflection floor.
enemyScaling.floorScaleDmgExpRate__doc: Compound enemy damage per floor for floors 2–inflection: damage mult × (1 + rate) each floor. Moderate exponential curve.
enemyScaling.floorScaleDmgExpRate_late__doc: Compound damage rate continued above hpInflectionFloor (usually lower than early rate to avoid one-shots).
enemyScaling.statMult__doc: Global multiplier applied to scaled enemy HP and damage after floor math. 1.25 = +25% on final rolled stats.

enemyLeaders__doc: Per-floor chance to spawn leader-augmented enemies (see EnemyLeaders.js). Chances should sum to 1.0 with floorChanceNone.

enemyLeaders.floorChanceNone__doc: Probability this floor has zero leader slots (no promoted enemies).
enemyLeaders.floorChanceOne__doc: Probability this floor gets exactly one leader slot.
enemyLeaders.floorChanceTwo__doc: Probability this floor gets two leader slots.
enemyLeaders.maxVisible__doc: Cap on how many leader-framed enemies can be visible on the grid at once.

voidTrial__doc: Void difficulty is relative to the main game: void uses main-game scaling at an equivalent floor, then void tier mults apply.

voidTrial.enemyBaseFloor__doc: Void trial floor 1 uses main-game enemy scaling as if the player were on this main-game floor. Each void floor adds +1 (voidEffectiveEnemyFloor).
